---
title: True Shape Network
subtitle: Creating True Shape Network for Travel Demand Model from UGRC Roadway Centerlines
description: A short description
author:
 - name: Pukar Bhandari
   email: pukar.bhandari@wfrc.utah.gov
   affiliation:
     - name: Wasatch Front Regional Council
       url: "https://wfrc.utah.gov/"
date: "2026-03-13"
---

Refer to Google Docs at: [https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ZHP1oQ9Gucw5fCv4U_dwvMSBbv5BmCBakXJjAcBijns/edit?usp=sharing](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ZHP1oQ9Gucw5fCv4U_dwvMSBbv5BmCBakXJjAcBijns/edit?usp=sharing) for draft methodology.
